Prerequisite.meaning: 履修必須条件、先修条件
Prerequisite.example: Mineralogy is a prerequisite for enrolling in the Advanced Petrology course.

Registration.example: Late registration for the field geology module requires approval from the Dean.

Transcript.example: You must submit an official transcript when applying for the geology exchange program.

Audit.example: I decided to audit the Geophysics lecture to broaden my understanding of mantle dynamics.

Withdrawal.example: The deadline for course withdrawal without academic penalty is next Friday.

Elective.example: Students can choose Volcanology as an elective during their final year.

Thesis.example: My master's thesis focuses on the metamorphic evolution of the Hida Belt.

Dissertation.example: His dissertation provided new constraints on the timing of the India-Asia collision.

Citation.example: Proper citation is mandatory when discussing previous tectonic models.

Plagiarism.example: The university has strict policies against plagiarism in scientific reporting.

Peer review.example: The manuscript is currently undergoing peer review in a major geology journal.

Colloquium.example: The department hosts a weekly colloquium featuring guest speakers in tectonics.

Faculty.example: The Faculty of Science offers several world-class programs in Earth Sciences.

Dean.example: The Dean announced new funding for the purchase of a high-resolution SEM.

Registrar.example: Please contact the Registrar's office to confirm your graduation status.

Scholarship.example: She was awarded a scholarship to conduct geochemical analysis abroad.

Fellowship.meaning: フェローシップ、研究員給付金
Fellowship.example: He received a post-doctoral fellowship to study seafloor spreading.

Commencement.example: The department's commencement ceremony will be held in the main auditorium.

Alumni.example: Many alumni of the geology department now work in the energy industry.

Rationale.example: The rationale for this sampling strategy is based on previous geophysical surveys.

Overview.example: The first chapter provides an overview of the regional geological history.

Outline.example: Before the presentation, please provide an outline of your research findings.

Literature.example: A thorough review of the literature revealed a lack of isotopic data for this region.

Gap.example: Our research aims to bridge the gap in our understanding of slab tear mechanisms.

Novelty.example: The novelty of this study lies in the application of AI to seismic interpretation.

Contribution.reading: コントリビューション
Contribution.example: This paper makes a significant contribution to the field of structural geology.

Apparatus.example: The experimental apparatus was designed to simulate high-pressure conditions in the mantle.

Protocol.example: Strict adherence to the cleaning protocol is required to avoid sample contamination.

Metric.example: The degree of roundness was used as a metric for sediment transport distance.

Comparison.example: A comparison between the two volcanic arcs reveals distinct geochemical signatures.

Consistency.example: The results show good consistency with the existing plate tectonic model.

Threshold.example: The earthquake was triggered when the stress exceeded the frictional threshold.

Validation.example: Field observations are necessary for the validation of numerical deformation models.

Prospect.example: Future prospects for geothermal energy in this region are promising.

Acknowledgement.example: We include an acknowledgement for the laboratory technicians who assisted with the analysis.

Appendix.example: Detailed isotopic data for all samples can be found in the Appendix.

Perspective.example: From a petrological perspective, the rock exhibits a complex cooling history.
